title: 'Ehuwd #0164
definition:
Ehud = "I will give thanks: I will be praised"
     or "undivided, union" in (\\#1Ch 8:6\\) only

 1) Benjamite judge of Israel, deliverer of Israel from Moab
 2) another Benjamite, son of Bilhan (\\#1Ch 8:6\\)
